tasks.label: Build+Install Lyo (Simulator)
args:
set -euo pipefail
SIM_UDID=AC0C3BCA-A0DB-4C35-A14D-D5A8E9FA3E35
xcrun simctl bootstatus "$SIM_UDID" -b
rm -rf /tmp/lyo_sim_dd
xcodebuild -project "/Users/hectorgarcia/LYO_Da_ONE/Lyo.xcodeproj" -scheme Lyo -configuration Debug -destination "id=$SIM_UDID" -derivedDataPath /tmp/lyo_sim_dd build
APP=$(find /tmp/lyo_sim_dd/Build/Products -maxdepth 2 -type d -name 'Lyo.app' | head -1)
echo "APP=$APP"
xcrun simctl install "$SIM_UDID" "$APP"
xcrun simctl launch "$SIM_UDID" com.lyo.app

tasks.label: Inspect /tmp/lyo_sim_dd
args: ls -la /tmp/lyo_sim_dd || true; find /tmp/lyo_sim_dd -maxdepth 4 -type d -name '*.app' | head -20; find /tmp/lyo_sim_dd -maxdepth 3 -type f -name '*.xcactivitylog' | head -10

tasks.label: Build+Install Lyo (Simulator, Workspace DD)
args:
set -euo pipefail
cd /Users/hectorgarcia/LYO_Da_ONE
SIM_UDID=AC0C3BCA-A0DB-4C35-A14D-D5A8E9FA3E35
xcrun simctl bootstatus "$SIM_UDID" -b
rm -rf build/lyo_sim_dd
xcodebuild -project Lyo.xcodeproj -scheme Lyo -configuration Debug -destination "id=$SIM_UDID" -derivedDataPath build/lyo_sim_dd build | tee build/sim_build.log
APP=$(find build/lyo_sim_dd/Build/Products -maxdepth 3 -type d -name 'Lyo.app' | head -1)
echo "APP=$APP"
if [ -z "$APP" ]; then echo 'No .app produced'; exit 2; fi
xcrun simctl install "$SIM_UDID" "$APP"
xcrun simctl launch "$SIM_UDID" com.lyo.app
